review_text: wow this C/park looks inviting by the photos

Great little park.
The owners are lovely and sweet.

Gone above and beyond
And have improved the park
Michelle is kind and lovely and accommodating and does the best she can

I like how peaceful the park is
Thank you:
This is home 🏡
At least it is a roof over your head
If you do the right thing there won't be any problems.
Updated review
Always working hard to achieve to get things done
And get it done.
I think they are genuinely lovely people.
You're in the country what does one expect
It is a small quiet peaceful area.
I think we need to appreciate what we have in australia.
Closed for now for caravans but cabins still ok

Best park i went to the manager Michelle is really lovely i was touring there and the landlord Michelle supplied me with toilet paper since I was tourist you can't expect a landlord to supply a permanent with toilet paper

I wish I could rate this place a zero. $40 a night and I think they should have paid us to stay there. What is with the toilet paper or should I say, the lack of loo paper. That is such a basic item. Only go there if you are desperate as we were. Otherwise give this place a miss.
Do not stay at this park ,it is not, I repete not a caravan park,.especially not with kids,.just sleep in your car .
For $40 per night dirty dry no toilet paper worst place ever!

$35 unpowered site. No camp kitchen, no toilet paper supplied. Showers were hot and had been cleaned but very old amenities to have to look after. Office is boarded up so difficult to know if it's open for business
Caretaker was pleasant
Still no toilet paper,  road noise , dodge  the bird poop
No...just no,  (unless you like drugs plenty of those there.)

If people clean up after themselves then it would be okay I live at the caravan park as I was homeless and the staff are lovely and if u keep to yourself then. No problems why whinge about no dunny paper it Ain't hard to buy some toilet paper  Michelle is a beautiful woman and without her I would be living in my car on the streets
